configurations.name: Scripty
runtimeArgs: export JAVA_HOME=/usr/local/opt/openjdk@17/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home && export PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH && export ADMIN_USERNAME=${ADMIN_USERNAME:-admin} ADMIN_PASSWORD=${ADMIN_PASSWORD:-admin} && mvn spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=dev -Dspring-boot.run.arguments=--server.port=${PORT:-8080}
